This skill, named `codex-skill-2x2-grid-prompt-rules-via-pixverse-cli`, is designed to generate 2x2 grid cinematic prompts for PixVerse CLI, adhering to strict rules including a 5000-character limit, specific opening/closing style tags, and ordered image references.
